Transfer Your PC experience with those apps

home
#DigitalContent


Most of the next software are free unless otherwise stated.

  • Kosmic
  • Arc
  • Comet
  • GPTAtlas (very expensive but has the ability to take actions on websites)
  • Obsidian
  • Anytype
  • SiYuan
  • DeepL
  • Playnet
  • Net Limiter (tool)
  • keyboard lock (tool)
  • Wispr Flow

Kosmik (paid)

A Browser acts like a whiteboard imbedded with AI. It is Amazing for Research either for science or for arts. IT is paid but has a free 1-week free trailer.

Arc

It is an elegant free browser with a new design concept. It is my default browser, it built on Chromium.

Comet (paid)

A browser from Perplexity. it allows the AI to take over the browser and make actions. It is paid now but used to be free.

GPTAtlas (paid)

Like Comet but this is the original author for the idea. and it is a lot more capable than Comet but also a lot more expensive.

Obsidian

The powerful offline free replacement for Notion. It has a mobile edition. but the Sync future is paid(this is the only paid thing in the app).

Anytype

My default knowledge base. It still in development but it is safe enough now to start using it. It is a local-first encrypted knowledge base. I prefer it more that Obsidian for now and it has a mobile edition too.

SiYuan

A free offline Chinese replacement for Notion. It has a Mobile edition too.

DeepL

AI translation app. very useful for scientific use & context. It has a PC version which adds a very useful futures like direct translating for text using short cuts. It also checks and improves texts but this is yet not supported for all languages.

PlayNet

For Games Lovers, this software is a video game library manager, it is very useful cool. It has themes which some of them gives the feel of PS themes. My best theme is PlayniteModernUI.

Net Limiter

Very powerfule and user friendly app to strict and control network access for all apps and services.

Keyboard Lock

If you study on your laptop and don't have a much space in your table so absolutly you want to lock you keyboard so you can put your notebook on it to write without worrying from doing something wrong with your PC.

Wispr Flow

Voice-to-text AI agent, you can talk and it will handle the input in any app or input field Very useful for journalists and for daily tasks. It has a ver generous free plane and very fast performance and accuracy even for the hard languages like Arabic and Russian. It works online but it feels like it is working offline because of its speed and low bandwidth.
